parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "startUrls": {{ JSON.stringify($json.urlsToScan) }},
  "pageFunction": "async function pageFunction({ request, $, body }) { return { url: request.url, html: body.substring(0, 50000), userData: request.userData }; }",
  "maxRequestsPerCrawl": 20,
  "maxConcurrency": 5,
  "proxyConfiguration": { "useApifyProxy": true, "apifyProxyGroups": ["RESIDENTIAL"] },
  "additionalMimeTypes": ["text/html"],
  "requestHandlerTimeoutSecs": 30
}

={{ JSON.stringify({ records: [{ fields: { "Nome": $json.nome, "Categoria": $json.categoria, "Cidade": $json.cidade, "Pais": $json.pais, "Telefone": $json.telefone, "Website": $json.website, "Google Maps URL": $json.gmapsUrl, "Rating": $json.rating, "Reviews Count": $json.reviewsCount, "Instagram URL": $json.instagramUrl || "", "Score": $json.score, "Classe": $json.classe, "Perfil": $json.perfil, "Servico Primario": $json.servicoPrimario, "Servico Secundario": $json.servicoSecundario, "Angulo Abordagem": $json.anguloAbordagem, "Gaps Detectados": $json.gapsDetected, "Tags Tech": $json.tagsTech, "Faz Trafego Pago": $json.fazTrafegoPago, "Responde Reviews": $json.respondsToReviews, "Tem Agendamento Online": $json.temAgendamento, "Ad Library URL": "https://www.facebook.com/ads/library/?active_status=active&ad_type=all&country=" + ($json.pais === "PT" ? "PT" : "BR") + "&q=" + encodeURIComponent($json.nome), "Status": "Novo", "Source": $json.source || "Google Maps", "Semana": $json.weekLabel, "Run Date": $json.runDate } }], typecast: true }) }}

nodes.name: Airtable: Write Lead
nodes.notes: SETUP: Substituir YOUR_AIRTABLE_TOKEN pelo Personal Access Token do Airtable

parameters.content:
## Lead Gen Pipeline — TM v4
### Clínicas Médicas e Estéticas

**v4:** Cheerio extrai Tags Tech + Instagram URL do HTML
Sem Apify Instagram actor (poupa RAM + créditos)

**Cron:** Segunda 09:00 UTC | 8 cidades

**Fluxo (19 nodes):**
1. GMaps (waitForFinish) → Pre-Filter top 10
2. Cheerio Scraper (residential proxy, waitForFinish)
3. Parse HTML: Tags Tech + Instagram + Gaps
4. Dedup Check (vs Airtable)
5. Claude Bridge (Mac Mini) — qualificação batch
6. Airtable + Telegram + WhatsApp

### TODO v5
- Meta Ad Library check (nome → faz ads Facebook?)
- Notion Tasks (Score A: due tomorrow, B: due Friday)
- ActiveCampaign nurture (Score A)
- Expandir TJ + CL
- Doctoralia.com.br scrape
- Instagram seguidores via Apify (quando upgrade Starter)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-4-6", max_tokens: 8192, output_config: { effort: "medium" }, messages: [{ role: "user", content: $json.prompt }] }) }}
